title: Level 2: The Exam Paper Leak
briefing: A confidential internal exam paper was leaked one night before the assessment. The file was stored in a restricted faculty folder.
solutionExplanation: Nisha used a temporary faculty login, accessed the exam folder, downloaded the paper, and later deleted browser history on the shared computer.

suspects.name: Prof. Arvind Rao
suspects.description: Prepared the exam paper and uploaded it to the restricted faculty folder.

suspects.name: Nisha Kulkarni
suspects.description: Helped with classroom coordination and had temporary access to faculty systems.

suspects.name: Rahul Jain
suspects.description: Was seen near the staff room but did not have official system access.

suspects.name: Sneha Pillai
suspects.description: Was asked to update printer drivers in the faculty lab.

evidence.title: Folder Access Log
evidence.content: The restricted exam folder was accessed at 7:42 PM using temporary login faculty_temp_03. The exam file final_internal_exam.pdf was downloaded at 7:44 PM.

evidence.title: Temporary Login Assignment Sheet
evidence.content: Temporary login faculty_temp_03 was assigned to Nisha Kulkarni for faculty lab work between 6:00 PM and 8:00 PM.

evidence.title: Witness Statement - Prof. Arvind Rao
evidence.content: Prof. Arvind Rao says he uploaded the final paper at 5:30 PM and left campus at 6:10 PM. His permanent faculty account was not used after 6:05 PM.

evidence.title: Witness Statement - Nisha Kulkarni
evidence.content: Nisha says she only used the faculty computer to format attendance sheets. She claims she did not open any exam-related folder.

evidence.title: Browser History Recovery Note
evidence.content: Recovered browser artifacts show that the exam folder page was opened at 7:43 PM. Browser history was manually cleared at 7:51 PM from the same machine.

evidence.title: Printer Driver Maintenance Log
evidence.content: Sneha Pillai updated printer drivers between 6:30 PM and 6:55 PM. Her IT account did not access the exam folder.

evidence.title: Staff Room CCTV Note
evidence.content: CCTV shows Nisha entering the faculty lab at 7:35 PM and leaving at 7:55 PM. Rahul Jain was seen near the staff room corridor at 7:20 PM but did not enter the faculty lab.

evidence.title: Incident Timeline
evidence.content: 5:30 PM: Prof. Arvind uploaded paper. 6:10 PM: Prof. Arvind exited campus. 7:35 PM: Nisha entered faculty lab. 7:42 PM: faculty_temp_03 accessed exam folder. 7:44 PM: exam file downloaded. 7:51 PM: browser history cleared. 7:55 PM: Nisha left faculty lab.
